# Hüseyin DOL (huseyindol)

> Senior Frontend Developer with 10+ years of experience building modern, scalable web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Also experienced in Java Spring Boot backend, Kubernetes DevOps, and React Native mobile. Based in Sancaktepe, İstanbul, Turkey.

Hüseyin DOL specializes in scalable, performant, and user-friendly full-stack architectures. He has hands-on experience in team leadership and mentoring junior developers.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://www.huseyindol.com): Portfolio overview — skills, experience highlights, and hero section
- [About](https://www.huseyindol.com/about): Professional background and personal story
- [Experience](https://www.huseyindol.com/experience): Career history, roles, and achievements
- [Skills](https://www.huseyindol.com/skills): Technical skill set across frontend, backend, and tooling
- [Blog](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog): Technical articles on Frontend, Backend, DevOps, Mobile, and AI topics
- [CV / Resume](https://www.huseyindol.com/assets/files/HuseyinDOL.pdf): Downloadable resume (PDF)
